title: Masreqah #4957
definition:
Masrekah = "vineyard of noble vines"

 1) an ancient place, the native spot of Samlah, one of the old kings
    of the Edomites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Masrekah = "vineyard of noble vines"

 1) an ancient place, the native spot of Samlah, one of the old kings
    of the Edomites

    NASB:  a place in Edom
